## 📝 Checklist

**Code Quality:**
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new console warnings or errors
- [ ] I have removed any console.log() or debugging code

**TypeScript:**
- [ ] No TypeScript errors
- [ ] Type definitions are accurate and complete
- [ ] No use of `any` type (or properly justified if necessary)

**Documentation:**
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] JSDoc comments added for new functions/components
- [ ] Code comments are clear and helpful

**Performance:**
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Animations are smooth (60fps)
- [ ] Images are optimized
- [ ] Unnecessary re-renders avoided (React.memo, useMemo, useCallback where appropriate)

**Accessibility:**
- [ ] ARIA labels added where needed
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works correctly
- [ ] Color contrast is sufficient (WCAG AA)
- [ ] Focus states are visible

**Design:**
- [ ] Follows the BTS Neural Archive aesthetic (purple ocean, cosmic theme)
- [ ] Responsive design implemented (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- [ ] Glass morphism effects applied consistently
- [ ] Animations follow project animation principles (smooth, purposeful)

**Git:**
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits format
- [ ] Branch is up to date with main
- [ ] No merge conflicts
